name: lunchmoney
description: Manage your Lunch Money finances with AI assistance
long_description: Connect Claude to your Lunch Money account to analyze spending patterns, manage budgets, track transactions, and get insights about your finances. This extension provides full access to Lunch Money's v2 API, enabling you to manage categories, transactions, budgets, manual accounts, tags, recurring items, and more through natural language commands.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get details on the current user.

tools.name: get_all_categories
tools.description: Get a list of all categories. Supports format (flattened/nested) and is_group filter.

tools.name: get_single_category
tools.description: Get details on a single category or category group, including children.

tools.name: create_category
tools.description: Create a category or category group. Set is_group=true and provide children to create a group.

tools.name: update_category
tools.description: Update properties for a category or category group; supports children replacement on groups.

tools.name: delete_category
tools.description: Delete a category or category group. Set force=true to override dependency check (irreversible). Returns structured dependents on HTTP 422.

tools.name: get_all_tags
tools.description: Get a list of all tags.

tools.name: get_single_tag
tools.description: Get details of a single tag by ID.

tools.name: create_tag
tools.description: Create a new tag (name, optional description, colors, archived).

tools.name: update_tag
tools.description: Update properties for an existing tag.

tools.name: delete_tag
tools.description: Delete a tag. Set force=true to override dependency check (irreversible).

tools.name: get_all_manual_accounts
tools.description: Get a list of all manually-managed accounts (formerly assets).

tools.name: get_single_manual_account
tools.description: Get details of a single manual account by ID.

tools.name: create_manual_account
tools.description: Create a new manually-managed account.

tools.name: update_manual_account
tools.description: Update an existing manually-managed account.

tools.name: delete_manual_account
tools.description: Delete a manual account. Optionally also delete its transactions and balance history.

tools.name: get_all_plaid_accounts
tools.description: Get a list of all Plaid (synced) accounts.

tools.name: get_single_plaid_account
tools.description: Get details of a single Plaid account by ID.

tools.name: trigger_plaid_fetch
tools.description: Trigger a fetch of latest data from Plaid. Optionally scope by date range and/or account ID.

tools.name: get_recurring_items
tools.description: Retrieve recurring items expected for a date range; optionally include system-suggested items.

tools.name: get_single_recurring_item
tools.description: Retrieve a single recurring item by ID; optional date range populates `matches`.

tools.name: get_budget_summary
tools.description: Get a per-category budget summary for a date range (backed by GET /summary). Supports occurrences, totals, and rollover-pool toggles.

tools.name: get_budget_settings
tools.description: Get the account's budget period and display settings (granularity, anchor date, etc).

tools.name: upsert_budget
tools.description: Create or update a budget for a category and budget period.

tools.name: remove_budget
tools.description: Remove the budget for a category and budget period. Idempotent.

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Retrieve transactions with rich filters (date range, account, category, tag, status, pending, metadata, etc). Returns has_more for pagination.

tools.name: get_single_transaction
tools.description: Get details of a specific transaction (always includes plaid_metadata, custom_metadata, files, and children for split/group parents).

tools.name: create_transactions
tools.description: Insert one or more transactions (1-500). Returns inserts and skipped duplicates.

tools.name: update_transaction
tools.description: Update an existing transaction (partial update). Set update_balance=false to skip account balance recompute.

tools.name: delete_transaction
tools.description: Delete a single transaction. Cannot delete split or grouped transactions.

tools.name: update_transactions_bulk
tools.description: Bulk update 1-500 transactions in a single call.

tools.name: delete_transactions_bulk
tools.description: Bulk delete 1-500 transactions by ID.

tools.name: create_transaction_group
tools.description: Create a transaction group from 2-500 existing transactions.

tools.name: delete_transaction_group
tools.description: Delete (ungroup) a transaction group. Children revert to ungrouped transactions.

tools.name: split_transaction
tools.description: Split a transaction into 2-500 child transactions whose amounts sum to the parent.

tools.name: unsplit_transaction
tools.description: Undo a previous split, deleting children and restoring the parent.

tools.name: attach_file_to_transaction
tools.description: Upload a local file (jpeg/png/heic/heif/pdf, max 10MB) and attach it to a transaction.

tools.name: get_transaction_attachment_url
tools.description: Get a short-lived signed download URL for a transaction file attachment.

tools.name: delete_transaction_attachment
tools.description: Delete a transaction file attachment. Irreversible.

tools.name: get_all_crypto
tools.description: Get cryptocurrency holdings (filters /manual_accounts to type=cryptocurrency).

tools.name: update_manual_crypto
tools.description: Update the balance of a manually-managed cryptocurrency account.

LUNCHMONEY_API_TOKEN.title: LunchMoney API Token
LUNCHMONEY_API_TOKEN.description: Your LunchMoney API token. You can obtain this from https://my.lunchmoney.app/settings/developer

LUNCHMONEY_DEBUG.title: Debug Logging
LUNCHMONEY_DEBUG.description: Enable debug logging of API requests and responses to stderr
